textPlain: Nice post. Similar to the zserge one about grayscale image recognition in its depth. https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=45771151I remember %|% being a .bat cmd.exe fork bomb. Could one consider fork bombs as next level quines?
I wonder how this would fare as a zip bomb against rogue LLM scrapers?
Finally! I've been looking for where I got this r.zip quine from. It's been a fun little zip to test things with.
